name: powerbi-calendar-visual
description: Advanced multi-measure custom calendar grid visual for Power BI.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const files=['./node_modules/webpack/lib/logging/Logger.js','./node_modules/powerbi-visuals-tools/node_modules/webpack/lib/logging/Logger.js'];files.forEach(f=>{if(fs.existsSync(f)){fs.writeFileSync(f,fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').replace(/throw new Error\(\`No such label.*/g,'return;'));}});"
